front: Describe the role of pharmacogenomics in clinical trial design.
back: Pharmacogenomic stratification: enrich for responders, exclude non-responders. HLA testing prevents hypersensitivity (abacavir, carbamazepine). DPYD testing for 5-FU. CYP2C19 for clopidogrel. Pre-emptive PGx testing in clinical practice. CPIC guidelines.
